name: Kiddieland International Limited
summary: Kiddieland International Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures, sells, imports, and exports plastic toy products targeting the toddlers' age group in the United States, Europe, the Asia Pacific and Oceania, and Africa. The company operates in two segments, Outdoor-and-Sports Toy and Infant-and-Preschool Toy. The Outdoor-and-Sports Toy segment manufactures and distributes ride-ons, rockers, trikes, scooters, and walkers. The Infant-and-Preschool Toy segment manufactures and distributes interactive playsets, activity toys, musical toys, and action vehicles. The company also provides design services for various graphic design requirements in production of toys, as well as merchandises production materials for toys. Kiddieland International Limited was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
